examples.title: Signal Set Generation - M-ary PSK
examples.description: Generate M-ary PSK signal constellation points
examples.code:
// M-ary PSK Signal Constellation Generation
// M = number of signal points
// E = signal energy per symbol

FUNCTION generatePSKConstellation(M, E):
 constellation = []
 amplitude = √E
 
 FOR i FROM 0 TO M-1:
 phase = (2 * π * i) / M
 I = amplitude * cos(phase)
 Q = amplitude * sin(phase)
 constellation.append(Complex(I, Q))
 
 RETURN constellation
examples.explanation: Generates M-PSK constellation by placing M points equally spaced on circle of radius √E

examples.title: Euclidean Distance Calculation
examples.description: Calculate Euclidean distance between two signal points
examples.code:
// Euclidean Distance between two signal vectors
// s1, s2 are N-dimensional signal vectors

FUNCTION euclideanDistance(s1, s2):
 sum = 0
 FOR i FROM 0 TO length(s1)-1:
 diff = s1[i] - s2[i]
 sum = sum + diff^2
 RETURN √sum

// Calculate minimum distance in signal set
FUNCTION calculateDmin(signalSet):
 dmin = ∞
 FOR i FROM 0 TO signalSet.length-1:
 FOR j FROM i+1 TO signalSet.length-1:
 d = euclideanDistance(signalSet[i], signalSet[j])
 IF d < dmin:
 dmin = d
 RETURN dmin
examples.explanation: Finds minimum Euclidean distance between any pair of signals in set

examples.title: Maximum Likelihood Detection
examples.explanation: ML detector chooses signal closest to received vector - optimal for AWGN

examples.description: Generate Gray code sequence for constellation mapping
examples.explanation: Gray coding ensures adjacent constellation points differ by only 1 bit
